12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Foundry Director Build - ordain, conjure, enshrine, mirror, graft operations (director credentials)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBFD_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfd multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBFD_SOURCED=1
26	
27	# Source shared Foundry Core module
28	source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh"
29	
30	# Source Foundry Verify module (ordain cross-module calls: rbfv_vouch, zrbfv_graft_metadata_submit)
31	source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbfv_FoundryVerify.sh"
32	
33	######################################################################
34	# Internal Functions (zrbfd_*)
35	
36	zrbfd_kindle() {
37	  test -z "${ZRBFD_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfd already kindled"
38	
39	  buc_log_args 'Kindle shared Foundry Core infrastructure'
40	  zrbfc_kindle
41	
42	  buc_log_args 'Verify service account files'
43	  test -n "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}" || buc_die "RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE not set"
44	  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"   || buc_die "GCB service env file not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
45	
46	  buc_log_args 'RBGJ files in same Tools directory as this implementation'
47	  # Acronym: rbgjb = Recipe Bottle Google Json Build (step scripts in rbgjb/ dir)
48	  local z_self_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
49	  readonly ZRBFD_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgjb"
50	  test -d "${ZRBFD_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}"   || buc_die "RBGJB steps directory not found: ${ZRBFD_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}"
51	
52	  # RBGJV and RBGJA step dirs now owned by rbfc_FoundryCore.sh (shared assembly helpers)
53	
54	  buc_log_args 'RBGJM mirror step scripts (same Tools directory)'
55	  # Acronym: rbgjm = Recipe Bottle Google Json Mirror (step scripts in rbgjm/ dir)
56	  readonly ZRBFD_RBGJM_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgjm"
57	  test -d "${ZRBFD_RBGJM_STEPS_DIR}"   || buc_die "RBGJM steps directory not found: ${ZRBFD_RBGJM_STEPS_DIR}"
58	
59	  buc_log_args 'RBGJE enshrine step scripts (same Tools directory)'
60	  # Acronym: rbgje = Recipe Bottle Google Json Enshrine (step scripts in rbgje/ dir)
61	  readonly ZRBFD_RBGJE_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgje"
62	  test -d "${ZRBFD_RBGJE_STEPS_DIR}"   || buc_die "RBGJE steps directory not found: ${ZRBFD_RBGJE_STEPS_DIR}"
63	
64	  # RBGJI inscribe step scripts now owned by rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh
65	
66	  # Delete, token, inscribe, reliquary prefixes now owned by rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh
67	  # Vouch and about prefixes now owned by rbfv_FoundryVerify.sh
68	
69	  buc_log_args 'Define stitch operation file prefix (postfixed per step id)'
70	  readonly ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_stitch_"
71	
72	  # Inscribe and reliquary prefixes now owned by rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh
73	
74	  buc_log_args 'Define mirror operation files'
75	  readonly ZRBFD_MIRROR_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_mirror_"
76	
77	  buc_log_args 'Define graft operation files'
78	  readonly ZRBFD_GRAFT_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_graft_"
79	
80	  buc_log_args 'Define enshrine operation files'
81	  readonly ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_enshrine_"
82	
83	  buc_log_args 'Define enshrine preflight files'
84	  readonly ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_preflight_"
85	
86	  buc_log_args 'Define context push operation files'
87	  readonly ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_context_"
88	
89	  buc_log_args 'Kindle verify module (cross-module calls from ordain)'
90	  zrbfv_kindle
91	
92	  readonly ZRBFD_KINDLED=1
93	}
94	
95	zrbfd_sentinel() {
96	  zrbfc_sentinel
97	  test "${ZRBFD_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbfd not kindled - call zrbfd_kindle first"
98	}
99	
100	
101	# Verify reliquary tool images exist in GAR.
102	# Full-subtree presence check: every canonical tool image must be present at
103	# the stamp. Inscribe creates all 6 atomically; piecemeal jettison or registry
104	# damage compromises the stamp's integrity. Misses are accumulated across the
105	# whole tool set so the operator sees full damage in one report.
106	# Args: token vessel_dir
107	zrbfd_preflight_reliquary() {
108	  zrbfd_sentinel
109	
110	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
111	  local -r z_vessel_dir="${2:-}"
112	  test -n "${z_token}"      || buc_die "zrbfd_preflight_reliquary: token required"
113	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "zrbfd_preflight_reliquary: vessel_dir required"
114	
115	  local -r z_reliquary="${RBRV_RELIQUARY:-}"
116	  test -n "${z_reliquary}" || buc_die "RBRV_RELIQUARY required on every ordain-path vessel — yoke a reliquary stamp via tt/${RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY}.sh before ordaining"
117	
118	  buc_step "Verifying reliquary tool images exist in GAR"
119	
120	  local -r z_canonical_tools=(
121	    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD}"
122	    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER}"
123	    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE}"
124	    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT}"
125	    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT}"
126	    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO}"
127	  )
128	
129	  local z_missing=()
130	  local z_tool=""
131	  local z_pkg=""
132	  local z_status_file=""
133	  local z_response_file=""
134	  local z_stderr_file=""
135	  local z_http_code=""
136	
137	  for z_tool in "${z_canonical_tools[@]}"; do
138	    z_pkg="${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}/${z_reliquary}/${z_tool}"
139	    z_status_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_${z_tool}_status.txt"
140	    z_response_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_${z_tool}_response.txt"
141	    z_stderr_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_${z_tool}_stderr.txt"
142	
143	    curl --head -sS \
144	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
145	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
146	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
147	      -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
148	      -w "%{http_code}" \
149	      -o "${z_response_file}" \
150	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_pkg}/manifests/${z_reliquary}" \
151	      > "${z_status_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
152	      || buc_die "HEAD request failed for reliquary tool: ${z_pkg}:${z_reliquary} — see ${z_stderr_file}"
153	
154	    z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
155	    test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for reliquary check: ${z_tool}"
156	
157	    case "${z_http_code}" in
158	      200) buc_log_args "Reliquary tool present: ${z_tool}" ;;
159	      404) z_missing+=("${z_tool}") ;;
160	      *)   buc_die "Unexpected HTTP ${z_http_code} when checking reliquary tool: ${z_pkg}:${z_reliquary}" ;;
161	    esac
162	  done
163	
164	  if test "${#z_missing[@]}" -eq 0; then
165	    buc_info "Reliquary verified: ${z_reliquary} (${#z_canonical_tools[@]}/${#z_canonical_tools[@]} tools present)"
166	    return 0
167	  fi
168	
169	  buc_warn "Reliquary integrity check failed: ${z_reliquary} (${#z_missing[@]}/${#z_canonical_tools[@]} tools missing)"
170	  buc_bare "  The reliquary is a co-versioned set of builder tool images (gcloud, docker,"
171	  buc_bare "  syft, alpine, binfmt, skopeo) inscribed from upstream into your private GAR."
172	  buc_bare "  Air-gapped worker pools cannot pull from the public internet — the reliquary"
173	  buc_bare "  stages these tools so builds can run without egress. Piecemeal jettison is"
174	  buc_bare "  allowed but unrecoverable surgically: re-inscribe the whole stamp."
175	  buc_bare ""
176	  for z_tool in "${z_missing[@]}"; do
177	    buc_bare "  PRECHECK: GAR image not found at ${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}/${z_reliquary}/${z_tool}"
178	    buc_bare "    Required by ${RBRV_SIGIL}'s RBRV_RELIQUARY=${z_reliquary}."
179	  done
180	  buc_bare ""
181	  buc_bare "  Recover by re-inscribing the reliquary, then re-yoking and re-ordaining:"
182	  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
183	  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY}" "<new-stamp>"
184	  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
185	  buc_die "Registry preflight failed — ${#z_missing[@]} of ${#z_canonical_tools[@]} reliquary tool images missing from GAR"
186	}
187	
188	
189	# Check concurrent build quota against regime requirements
190	# Args: token mode
191	#   mode: "gate" (die if insufficient) or "advisory" (warn if insufficient)
192	zrbfd_quota_preflight() {
193	  zrbfd_sentinel
194	
195	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
196	
197	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "zrbfd_quota_preflight: token required"
198	
199	  # Extract vCPU count from machine type (last segment after final hyphen)
200	  local -r z_vcpus="${RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE##*-}"
201	  case "${z_vcpus}" in
202	    ""|0|*[!0-9]*)
203	      buc_warn "Cannot parse vCPU count from RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE='${RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}' -- skipping quota preflight"
204	      return 0
205	      ;;
206	  esac
207	
208	  buc_log_args "Machine type ${RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE} = ${z_vcpus} vCPUs"
209	
210	  # Query Service Usage consumer quota API for concurrent_private_pool_build_cpus
211	  local -r z_metric_encoded="cloudbuild.googleapis.com%2Fconcurrent_private_pool_build_cpus"
212	  local -r z_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/services/cloudbuild.googleapis.com/consumerQuotaMetrics/${z_metric_encoded}"
213	
214	  buc_step "Checking concurrent build quota"
215	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "quota_preflight"
216	
217	  local z_code=""
218	  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "quota_preflight") || z_code=""
219	  if test "${z_code}" != "200"; then
220	    buc_warn "Could not query build quota (HTTP ${z_code}) -- skipping preflight check"
221	    return 0
222	  fi
223	
224	  # Filter quota response to region-specific bucket via intermediate file
225	  rbuh_jq_file_to_file_ok "quota_preflight" "quota_region" \
226	    "[.consumerQuotaLimits[0].quotaBuckets[] | select(.dimensions.region == \"${RBRD_GCP_REGION}\")] | .[0] // {}" \
227	    || true
228	
229	  # Extract effective limit from region bucket, then fallback to first bucket
230	  local z_limit=""
231	  z_limit=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "quota_region" '.effectiveLimit') || z_limit=""
232	  if test -z "${z_limit}"; then
233	    z_limit=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "quota_preflight" \
234	      '.consumerQuotaLimits[0].quotaBuckets[0].effectiveLimit') || z_limit=""
235	  fi
236	
237	  if test -z "${z_limit}"; then
238	    buc_warn "Could not extract quota limit -- skipping preflight check"
239	    return 0
240	  fi
241	
242	  # -1 means unlimited
243	  if test "${z_limit}" = "-1"; then
244	    buc_info "Quota: unlimited concurrent private pool build CPUs"
245	    return 0
246	  fi
247	
248	  # Compute max concurrent builds
249	  local -r z_max_concurrent=$((z_limit / z_vcpus))
250	
251	  buc_log_args "Quota ${z_limit} vCPUs, machine ${z_vcpus} vCPUs, max concurrent ${z_max_concurrent}, required ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"
252	
253	  if test "${z_max_concurrent}" -lt "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"; then
254	    buc_warn "Build quota insufficient: ${z_limit} vCPU quota / ${z_vcpus} vCPUs per build = ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
255	    buc_warn "Fresh depots start with a low quota. After some build activity, the Edit Quotas option becomes available."
256	    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD}"
257	  else
258	    buc_info "Quota OK: ${z_limit} vCPU / ${z_vcpus} per build = ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
259	  fi
260	}
261	
262	# Internal: Verify that all required images exist in GAR before submitting
263	# to Cloud Build. Checks two layers in dependency order:
264	#
265	#   1. Reliquary — co-versioned builder tool images (gcloud, docker, syft, etc.)
266	#      created by inscribe. One reliquary per depot setup. Enshrine depends on it.
267	#   2. Enshrine — upstream base images copied into private GAR, pinned by content
268	#      hash. One enshrine per base image anchor. Multiple vessels sharing the same
269	#      anchor only need one enshrine.
270	#
271	# A missing image at either layer causes a Cloud Build failure minutes later.
272	# This preflight catches it immediately with copy-paste remediation commands.
273	#
274	# Must be called after vessel load (reads RBRV_RELIQUARY, RBRV_IMAGE_*_ANCHOR)
275	# and authentication (needs token for registry API).
276	zrbfd_registry_preflight() {
277	  zrbfd_sentinel
278	
279	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
280	  local -r z_vessel_dir="${2:-}"
281	  test -n "${z_token}"      || buc_die "zrbfd_registry_preflight: token required"
282	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "zrbfd_registry_preflight: vessel_dir required"
283	
284	  # --- Layer 1: Reliquary tool images ---
285	  zrbfd_preflight_reliquary "${z_token}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
286	
287	  # --- Layer 2: Enshrined base images ---
288	  # Each vessel declares base images via RBRV_IMAGE_n_ORIGIN (upstream tag) and
289	  # RBRV_IMAGE_n_ANCHOR (locator: package-path:tag). Enshrine copies the upstream
290	  # image into the enshrine namespace, pinned by content hash. The conjure
291	  # Dockerfile's FROM references the locator-resolved GAR ref, not upstream tag.
292	
293	  buc_step "Verifying enshrined base images exist in GAR"
294	
295	  local z_n=""
296	  local z_anchor_var=""
297	  local z_anchor=""
298	  local z_pkg_path=""
299	  local z_tag=""
300	  local z_origin_var=""
301	  local z_origin=""
302	  local z_any_checked="false"
303	  local z_status_file=""
304	  local z_response_file=""
305	  local z_stderr_file=""
306	  local z_http_code=""
307	
308	  for z_n in 1 2 3; do
309	    z_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_n}_ORIGIN"
310	    z_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_n}_ANCHOR"
311	    z_origin="${!z_origin_var:-}"
312	    z_anchor="${!z_anchor_var:-}"
313	
314	    # Skip slots without an origin (no base image to enshrine).
315	    test -n "${z_origin}" || continue
316	
317	    # Anchor handling depends on egress mode. Tether passes through (buildx
318	    # fetches upstream at build time). Airgap requires a populated anchor
319	    # because the worker pool has no upstream egress — an empty anchor with
320	    # a non-empty origin guarantees runtime build failure.
321	    if test -z "${z_anchor}"; then
322	      if test "${RBRV_EGRESS_MODE:-}" = "rbnve_airgap"; then
323	        # Two anchor-population paths per RBSAE: enshrine (origin is a public
324	        # upstream) and hallmark-pin (origin names a producer vessel in this
325	        # repo). Discriminate by whether origin resolves to a vessel directory.
326	        if test -d "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_origin}"; then
327	          buc_warn "Airgap vessel ${RBRV_SIGIL} has empty ${z_anchor_var}; origin ${z_origin} names a producer vessel"
328	          buc_bare "  ${z_anchor_var} is a hallmark-pin, not an enshrine locator — enshrine is not invoked on this vessel."
329	          buc_bare "  Ordain the producer vessel first, then write its hallmark into ${z_anchor_var}."
330	          buc_bare "  Canonical handbook path:"
331	          buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_AIRGAP}"
332	          buc_bare "  Minimal manual sequence:"
333	          buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_origin}"
334	          buc_bare "    export PRODUCER_HALLMARK=\$(cat \${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
335	          buc_bare "    # set ${z_anchor_var}=rbi_hm/\${PRODUCER_HALLMARK}/image:\${PRODUCER_HALLMARK}"
336	          buc_bare "    # in ${z_vessel_dir}/rbrv.env, then:"
337	          buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
338	          buc_die "Registry preflight failed — airgap vessel missing hallmark-pin anchor"
339	        else
340	          buc_warn "Airgap vessel ${RBRV_SIGIL} has empty ${z_anchor_var} but non-empty ${z_origin_var}=${z_origin}"
341	          buc_bare "  Airgap conjure cannot reach upstream — base images must be enshrined first."
342	          buc_bare "  The anchor locator points at the enshrined image inside GAR. Without it,"
343	          buc_bare "  the airgap worker pool has no source for the base image and the build fails."
344	          buc_bare "  Run enshrine, then re-run ordain:"
345	          buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
346	          buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
347	          buc_die "Registry preflight failed — airgap vessel missing required anchor"
348	        fi
349	      fi
350	      continue
351	    fi
352	
353	    case "${z_anchor}" in
354	      *:*) : ;;
355	      *)   buc_die "Invalid ${z_anchor_var} locator format (expected package-path:tag): ${z_anchor}" ;;
356	    esac
357	    z_pkg_path="${z_anchor%:*}"
358	    z_tag="${z_anchor##*:}"
359	    test -n "${z_pkg_path}" || buc_die "Package path is empty in ${z_anchor_var}: ${z_anchor}"
360	    test -n "${z_tag}"      || buc_die "Tag is empty in ${z_anchor_var}: ${z_anchor}"
361	
362	    z_any_checked="true"
363	    z_status_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}enshrine_${z_n}_status.txt"
364	    z_response_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}enshrine_${z_n}_response.txt"
365	    z_stderr_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}enshrine_${z_n}_stderr.txt"
366	
367	    curl --head -sS \
368	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
369	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
370	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
371	      -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
372	      -w "%{http_code}" \
373	      -o "${z_response_file}" \
374	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_pkg_path}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
375	      > "${z_status_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
376	      || buc_die "HEAD request failed for enshrined image: ${z_anchor} — see ${z_stderr_file}"
377	
378	    z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
379	    test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for enshrine check"
380	
381	    if test "${z_http_code}" = "404"; then
382	      buc_warn "Enshrined base image not found: ${z_anchor} (from ${z_origin})"
383	      buc_bare "  Enshrine copies upstream base images (e.g., busybox:latest from Docker Hub) into"
384	      buc_bare "  your private GAR, pinned by content hash. Like the reliquary, this ensures"
385	      buc_bare "  air-gapped builds never reach the public internet. The anchor locator is stable"
386	      buc_bare "  until you deliberately re-enshrine to pick up a newer upstream version."
387	      buc_bare "  Multiple vessels sharing the same base image anchor need only one enshrine."
388	      buc_bare "  Run enshrine, then re-run ordain:"
389	      buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
390	      buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
391	      buc_die "Registry preflight failed — enshrined base image missing from GAR"
392	    elif test "${z_http_code}" != "200"; then
393	      buc_die "Unexpected HTTP ${z_http_code} when checking enshrined image: ${z_anchor}"
394	    fi
395	
396	    buc_log_args "Enshrined image verified: ${z_anchor}"
397	  done
398	
399	  if test "${z_any_checked}" = "true"; then
400	    buc_info "All enshrined base images verified in GAR"
401	  fi
402	}
403	
404	
405	zrbfd_stitch_build_json() {
406	  zrbfd_sentinel
407	
408	  local -r z_output_path="${1:?Output path required}"
409	  local -r z_hallmark="${2:?Hallmark required}"
410	  local -r z_context_tag="${3:?Context image tag required}"
411	
412	  buc_log_args "Stitching builds.create JSON to ${z_output_path}"
413	
414	  # Preconditions: vessel loaded and git state captured
415	  test -s "${ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Vessel not loaded — call zrbfc_load_vessel first"
416	  test -s "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}"     || buc_die "Git info not captured — ensure git metadata is captured before stitch"
417	
418	  buc_log_args 'Read vessel state for substitutions'
419	  local -r z_sigil=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}")
420	  test -n "${z_sigil}" || buc_die "Empty vessel sigil"
421	  local -r z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
422	  local -r z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
423	
424	  # Resolve base images: ANCHOR (locator) → full GAR reference, or pass ORIGIN through.
425	  # Spec: RBSAC step "Resolve Base Images"
426	  # The locator carries its own namespace path (e.g. rbi_es/<anchor>:<anchor>);
427	  # paths within a GAR repo are prefix-free per the wrest/jettison convention.
428	  # Locator captures (z_image_locator_n) feed _RBGR_ENSHRINE_LOCATOR_n substitutions
429	  # for the in-pool preflight step — anchored slots get HEAD-checked, pass-through
430	  # slots stay empty (preflight cannot reach upstream from the worker pool).
431	  local -r z_gar_repo_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
432	  local z_image_ref_1="" z_image_ref_2="" z_image_ref_3=""
433	  local z_image_locator_1="" z_image_locator_2="" z_image_locator_3=""
434	  local z_ri_n="" z_ri_origin_var="" z_ri_anchor_var="" z_ri_origin="" z_ri_anchor=""
435	  local z_ri_pkg_path=""
436	  local z_ri_tag=""
437	  for z_ri_n in 1 2 3; do
438	    z_ri_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_ri_n}_ORIGIN"
439	    z_ri_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_ri_n}_ANCHOR"
440	    z_ri_origin="${!z_ri_origin_var:-}"
441	    z_ri_anchor="${!z_ri_anchor_var:-}"
442	    test -n "${z_ri_origin}" || continue
443	    local z_ri_ref=""
444	    local z_ri_locator=""
445	    if test -n "${z_ri_anchor}"; then
446	      case "${z_ri_anchor}" in
447	        *:*) : ;;
448	        *)   buc_die "Invalid ${z_ri_anchor_var} locator format (expected package-path:tag): ${z_ri_anchor}" ;;
449	      esac
450	      z_ri_pkg_path="${z_ri_anchor%:*}"
451	      z_ri_tag="${z_ri_anchor##*:}"
452	      test -n "${z_ri_pkg_path}" || buc_die "Package path is empty in ${z_ri_anchor_var}: ${z_ri_anchor}"
453	      test -n "${z_ri_tag}"      || buc_die "Tag is empty in ${z_ri_anchor_var}: ${z_ri_anchor}"
454	      z_ri_ref="${z_gar_repo_base}/${z_ri_pkg_path}:${z_ri_tag}"
455	      z_ri_locator="${z_ri_anchor}"
456	      buc_log_args "Image slot ${z_ri_n} (anchored): ${z_ri_ref}"
457	    else
458	      z_ri_ref="${z_ri_origin}"
459	      buc_log_args "Image slot ${z_ri_n} (pass-through): ${z_ri_ref}"
460	    fi
461	    case "${z_ri_n}" in
462	      1) z_image_ref_1="${z_ri_ref}"; z_image_locator_1="${z_ri_locator}" ;;
463	      2) z_image_ref_2="${z_ri_ref}"; z_image_locator_2="${z_ri_locator}" ;;
464	      3) z_image_ref_3="${z_ri_ref}"; z_image_locator_3="${z_ri_locator}" ;;
465	    esac
466	  done
467	
468	  # Platform count detection
469	  local z_platform_count=0
470	  local z_remaining_count="${z_platforms}"
471	  local z_p_count=""
472	  while test -n "${z_remaining_count}"; do
473	    z_p_count="${z_remaining_count%%,*}"
474	    z_platform_count=$((z_platform_count + 1))
475	    test "${z_remaining_count}" != "${z_p_count}" || break
476	    z_remaining_count="${z_remaining_count#*,}"
477	  done
478	  buc_log_args "Vessel platforms: ${z_platform_count} (${z_platforms})"
479	
480	  buc_log_args 'Extract git state for substitutions'
481	  local -r z_stitch_git_commit_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_commit.txt"
482	  local -r z_stitch_git_branch_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_branch.txt"
483	  local -r z_stitch_git_repo_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_repo.txt"
484	
485	  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_commit_file}" \
486	    || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit from info file"
487	  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_branch_file}" \
488	    || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch from info file"
489	  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_repo_file}" \
490	    || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo from info file"
491	
492	  local -r z_git_commit=$(<"${z_stitch_git_commit_file}")
493	  local -r z_git_branch=$(<"${z_stitch_git_branch_file}")
494	  local -r z_git_repo=$(<"${z_stitch_git_repo_file}")
495	
496	  test -n "${z_git_commit}" || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
497	  test -n "${z_git_branch}" || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
498	  test -n "${z_git_repo}"   || buc_die "Git repo is empty"
499	
500	  # Build strategy: compare vessel platforms against runner platform
501	  # If platforms exactly match the runner, no QEMU emulation is needed (native build).
502	  # Any difference (multi-platform or non-native single-platform) requires binfmt.
503	  local z_needs_binfmt="true"
504	  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}" = "${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM}"; then
505	    z_needs_binfmt="false"
506	  fi
507	
508	  local z_build_strategy=""
509	  if test "${z_needs_binfmt}" = "true"; then
510	    z_build_strategy="emulated multi-platform via QEMU (${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,})"
511	    buc_log_args "Build strategy: ${z_build_strategy} — rbgjb02 included"
512	  else
513	    z_build_strategy="native single-platform (${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM})"
514	    buc_log_args "Build strategy: ${z_build_strategy} — rbgjb02 excluded"
515	  fi
516	
517	  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
518	  # Entrypoint 'bash' → #!/bin/bash shebang, 'sh' → #!/bin/sh shebang (GCB script field)
519	  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
520	  # Pipeline: buildx --push → per-platform pullback → SLSA provenance via images: field
521	  local z_step_defs=(
522	    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_gcloud}|bash|derive-tag-base"
523	  )
524	  if test "${z_needs_binfmt}" = "true"; then
525	    z_step_defs+=("rbgjb02-qemu-binfmt.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|qemu-binfmt")
526	  fi
527	  z_step_defs+=(
528	    "rbgjb03-buildx-push-image.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|buildx-push-image"
529	    "rbgjb04-per-platform-pullback.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|per-platform-pullback"
530	    "rbgjb05-push-per-platform.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|push-per-platform"
531	    "rbgjb06-push-diags.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|push-diags"
532	  )
533	
534	  # Compute platform suffixes (used in images: field and substitutions)
535	  # Always computed: linux/amd64 → -amd64, linux/arm64 → -arm64, linux/arm/v7 → -armv7
536	  local z_platform_suffixes=""
537	  local z_platform_suffixes_csv=""
538	  local z_remaining_plats="${z_platforms}"
539	  local z_plat=""
540	  local z_suffix=""
541	  while test -n "${z_remaining_plats}"; do
542	    z_plat="${z_remaining_plats%%,*}"
543	    # Strip linux/ prefix, collapse remaining slashes: linux/arm/v7 → armv7
544	    z_suffix="${z_plat#linux/}"
545	    z_suffix="${z_suffix//\//}"
546	    z_suffix="-${z_suffix}"
547	    if test -n "${z_platform_suffixes}"; then
548	      z_platform_suffixes="${z_platform_suffixes},${z_suffix}"
549	    else
550	      z_platform_suffixes="${z_suffix}"
551	    fi
552	    test "${z_remaining_plats}" != "${z_plat}" || break
553	    z_remaining_plats="${z_remaining_plats#*,}"
554	  done
555	  z_platform_suffixes_csv="${z_platform_suffixes}"
556	  buc_log_args "Platform suffixes: ${z_platform_suffixes_csv}"
557	
558	  local z_def=""
559	  local z_script=""
560	  local z_builder=""
561	  local z_entrypoint=""
562	  local z_id=""
563	  local z_script_path=""
564	  local z_body=""
565	  local z_shebang=""
566	  local z_body_file=""
567	  local z_escaped_file=""
568	  local z_steps_file=""
569	  local z_accumulator_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
570	
571	  buc_log_args "Initializing empty steps array"
572	  echo "[]" > "${z_accumulator_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize steps JSON"
573	
574	  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
575	    IFS='|' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
576	    z_script_path="${ZRBFD_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
577	    z_body_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_body.txt"
578	    z_escaped_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
579	    z_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_steps.json"
580	
581	    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
582	
583	    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_id} (skip shebang, comments pass through)"
584	    zrbfc_write_script_body "${z_script_path}" "${z_body_file}" || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
585	    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
586	    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty script body: ${z_script_path}"
587	
588	    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs and build strategy into script text"
589	    z_body="${z_body//\$\{ZRBF_TOOL_BINFMT\}/${z_rbfc_tool_binfmt}}"
590	    z_body="${z_body//\$\{ZRBF_BUILD_STRATEGY\}/${z_build_strategy}}"
591	
592	    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
593	      bash) z_shebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
594	      sh)   z_shebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
595	      *)    buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_entrypoint}" ;;
596	    esac
597	    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_shebang}" "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
598	      || buc_die "Failed to write script body for ${z_id}"
599	
600	    buc_log_args "Appending step ${z_id} to JSON array"
601	    jq \
602	      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
603	      --arg id "${z_id}" \
604	      --arg dir "${z_sigil}" \
605	      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
606	      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, dir: $dir, script: $script}]' \
607	      "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${z_steps_file}" \
608	      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id} to JSON"
609	    mv "${z_steps_file}" "${z_accumulator_file}" \
610	      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
611	  done
612	
613	  # === Combined conjure: embed about steps after image steps ===
614	  # About steps use _RBGA_* substitutions delivered via the substitutions block.
615	  # _RBGA_BUILD_ID is the lone exception — Cloud Build job ID, only available
616	  # at runtime as the built-in $BUILD_ID env var; rewritten below.
617	
618	  buc_log_args "Assembling about steps for combined conjure"
619	  local -r z_about_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_steps.json"
620	  zrbfc_assemble_about_steps "${z_about_steps_file}" "${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_"
621	
622	  # About steps run in vessel dir so .hallmark from rbgjb01 is accessible
623	  buc_log_args "Adding dir field to about steps for vessel directory ${z_sigil}"
624	  local -r z_about_with_dir="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_with_dir.json"
625	  jq --arg dir "${z_sigil}" '[.[] | . + {dir: $dir}]' \
626	    "${z_about_steps_file}" > "${z_about_with_dir}" \
627	    || buc_die "Failed to add dir to about steps"
628	
629	  # Build ID: $BUILD_ID → GCB built-in available as env var
630	  buc_log_args "Post-processing about steps: build ID from env"
631	  local -r z_about_processed="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_processed.json"
632	  local z_about_content
633	  z_about_content=$(<"${z_about_with_dir}") \
634	    || buc_die "Failed to read about steps for post-processing"
635	  z_about_content="${z_about_content//\$\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\}/\$BUILD_ID}"
636	  printf '%s' "${z_about_content}" > "${z_about_processed}" \
637	    || buc_die "Failed to post-process about steps for conjure"
638	
639	  buc_log_args "Combining image steps and about steps"
640	  local -r z_combined_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}combined_steps.json"
641	  jq -s '.[0] + .[1]' "${z_accumulator_file}" "${z_about_processed}" \
642	    > "${z_combined_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to combine image and about steps"
643	  z_accumulator_file="${z_combined_steps_file}"
644	
645	  # Fallback for -diags extraction failure; -diags is the primary path for conjure
646	  buc_log_args "Reading Dockerfile content for _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT substitution"
647	  local z_stitch_dockerfile_content=""
648	  local -r z_stitch_df_max_bytes=4000
649	  if test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}"; then
650	    z_stitch_dockerfile_content=$(<"${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}")
651	    if test "${#z_stitch_dockerfile_content}" -gt "${z_stitch_df_max_bytes}"; then
652	      buc_warn "Dockerfile exceeds 4KB substitution limit (${#z_stitch_dockerfile_content} bytes) — recipe.txt via -diags only"
653	      z_stitch_dockerfile_content=""
654	    fi
655	  fi
656	
657	  # Compose builds.create Build resource
658	  # All values resolved directly — no placeholders, no post-processing jq surgery.
659	  # Context extraction step prepended; mason SA included; images: field uses inscribe_ts.
660	  buc_log_args "Composing builds.create Build resource"
661	  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}build.json"
662	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
663	
664	  # Context extraction step (first step — extracts build context from pouch in GAR)
665	  local -r z_extract_step_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}extract_step.json"
666	  jq -n \
667	    --arg name "${z_rbfc_tool_docker}" \
668	    --arg ctx_tag "${z_context_tag}" \
669	    --arg sigil "${z_sigil}" \
670	    '{
671	      name: $name,
672	      id: "extract-context",
673	      entrypoint: "/bin/bash",
674	      args: ["-lc", ("set -euo pipefail\necho \"Extracting build context from GAR\"\nCONTAINER=$$(docker create " + $ctx_tag + " /nonexistent)\nmkdir -p /workspace/" + $sigil + "\ndocker cp $${CONTAINER}:/build-context/. /workspace/" + $sigil + "/\ndocker rm $${CONTAINER}\necho \"Context extracted:\"\nls -la /workspace/" + $sigil + "/")]
675	    }' > "${z_extract_step_file}" \
676	    || buc_die "Failed to compose context extraction step"
677	
678	  # Step 0: in-pool reliquary preflight (defense-in-depth)
679	  local -r z_preflight_step_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}preflight_step.json"
680	  zrbfc_assemble_preflight_step "${z_preflight_step_file}" "${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}"
681	
682	  # Combine: [preflight] + [extract-context] + image steps + about steps
683	  local -r z_all_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}all_steps.json"
684	  jq -s '.[0] + .[1] + .[2]' \
685	    "${z_preflight_step_file}" \
686	    <(jq -s '.' "${z_extract_step_file}") \
687	    "${z_accumulator_file}" \
688	    > "${z_all_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to combine preflight, context extraction, and image+about steps"
689	
690	  # images: field — one per-platform attest tag per platform for SLSA provenance via CB images: push
691	  # These are durable provenance-carrying tags on the single attest package
692	  # (rbi_hm/<H>/attest); deleted only by abjure.
693	  local z_images_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}images.json"
694	  local z_attest_pkg="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/attest"
695	  local z_remaining_suffixes="${z_platform_suffixes_csv}"
696	  local z_img_suffix=""
697	  echo "[]" > "${z_images_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize images JSON"
698	  while test -n "${z_remaining_suffixes}"; do
699	    z_img_suffix="${z_remaining_suffixes%%,*}"
700	    jq --arg uri "${z_attest_pkg}:${z_hallmark}${z_img_suffix}" \
701	      '. + [$uri]' "${z_images_file}" > "${z_images_file}.tmp" \
702	      || buc_die "Failed to append image URI"
703	    mv "${z_images_file}.tmp" "${z_images_file}" \
704	      || buc_die "Failed to update images JSON"
705	    test "${z_remaining_suffixes}" != "${z_img_suffix}" || break
706	    z_remaining_suffixes="${z_remaining_suffixes#*,}"
707	  done
708	
709	  # shellcheck disable=SC2016
710	  local -r z_cb_build_id='$BUILD_ID'
711	
712	  # Pool routing: conjure/bind use vessel's egress mode
713	  local z_conjure_pool=""
714	  case "${RBRV_EGRESS_MODE}" in
715	    rbnve_tether) z_conjure_pool="${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" ;;
716	    rbnve_airgap) z_conjure_pool="${RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP}" ;;
717	    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRV_EGRESS_MODE: ${RBRV_EGRESS_MODE}" ;;
718	  esac
719	
720	  jq -n \
721	    --slurpfile zjq_steps  "${z_all_steps_file}" \
722	    --slurpfile zjq_images "${z_images_file}" \
723	    --arg zjq_dockerfile        "${z_dockerfile_name}" \
724	    --arg zjq_vessel            "${z_sigil}" \
725	    --arg zjq_platforms         "${z_platforms}" \
726	    --arg zjq_platform_suffixes "${z_platform_suffixes_csv}" \
727	    --arg zjq_gar_location      "${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}" \
728	    --arg zjq_gar_project       "${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}" \
729	    --arg zjq_gar_repository    "${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
730	    --arg zjq_git_commit        "${z_git_commit}" \
731	    --arg zjq_git_branch        "${z_git_branch}" \
732	    --arg zjq_git_repo          "${z_git_repo}" \
733	    --arg zjq_gar_host_suffix   "${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}" \
734	    --arg zjq_hallmarks_root    "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}" \
735	    --arg zjq_hallmark          "${z_hallmark}" \
736	    --arg zjq_inscribe_ts       "${z_hallmark%%-r*}" \
737	    --arg zjq_pool              "${z_conjure_pool}" \
738	    --arg zjq_timeout           "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
739	    --arg zjq_mason_sa          "${z_mason_sa}" \
740	    --arg zjq_cb_build_id       "${z_cb_build_id}" \
741	    --arg zjq_rbga_gar_host     "${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}" \
742	    --arg zjq_rbga_gar_path     "${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
743	    --arg zjq_rbga_dockerfile   "${z_stitch_dockerfile_content}" \
744	    --arg zjq_image_1           "${z_image_ref_1}" \
745	    --arg zjq_image_2           "${z_image_ref_2}" \
746	    --arg zjq_image_3           "${z_image_ref_3}" \
747	    --arg zjq_basename_image    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}" \
748	    --arg zjq_basename_about    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}" \
749	    --arg zjq_basename_attest   "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}" \
750	    --arg zjq_basename_diags    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}" \
751	    --arg zjq_reliquaries_root  "${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}" \
752	    --arg zjq_reliquary         "${RBRV_RELIQUARY}" \
753	    --arg zjq_locator_1         "${z_image_locator_1}" \
754	    --arg zjq_locator_2         "${z_image_locator_2}" \
755	    --arg zjq_locator_3         "${z_image_locator_3}" \
756	    '{
757	      steps: [$zjq_steps[0][] |
758	        if .args then
759	          .args = [.args[] | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id) | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id)]
760	        elif .script then
761	          .script = (.script | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id) | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id))
762	        else . end],
763	      images: $zjq_images[0],
764	      substitutions: {
765	        _RBGY_DOCKERFILE:          $zjq_dockerfile,
766	        _RBGY_PLATFORMS:           $zjq_platforms,
767	        _RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES:   $zjq_platform_suffixes,
768	        _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION:        $zjq_gar_location,
769	        _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT:         $zjq_gar_project,
770	        _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY:      $zjq_gar_repository,
771	        _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT:          $zjq_git_commit,
772	        _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH:          $zjq_git_branch,
773	        _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX:     $zjq_gar_host_suffix,
774	        _RBGY_HALLMARKS_ROOT:      $zjq_hallmarks_root,
775	        _RBGY_HALLMARK:            $zjq_hallmark,
776	        _RBGY_IMAGE_1:             $zjq_image_1,
777	        _RBGY_IMAGE_2:             $zjq_image_2,
778	        _RBGY_IMAGE_3:             $zjq_image_3,
779	        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE:  $zjq_basename_image,
780	        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST: $zjq_basename_attest,
781	        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS:  $zjq_basename_diags,
782	        _RBGA_GAR_HOST:            $zjq_rbga_gar_host,
783	        _RBGA_GAR_PATH:            $zjq_rbga_gar_path,
784	        _RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT:      $zjq_hallmarks_root,
785	        _RBGA_HALLMARK:            $zjq_hallmark,
786	        _RBGA_VESSEL:              $zjq_vessel,
787	        _RBGA_VESSEL_MODE:         "rbnve_conjure",
788	        _RBGA_GIT_COMMIT:          $zjq_git_commit,
789	        _RBGA_GIT_BRANCH:          $zjq_git_branch,
790	        _RBGA_GIT_REPO:            $zjq_git_repo,
791	        _RBGA_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP:  $zjq_inscribe_ts,
792	        _RBGA_BIND_SOURCE:         "",
793	        _RBGA_GRAFT_SOURCE:        "",
794	        _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT:  $zjq_rbga_dockerfile,
795	        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE:  $zjq_basename_image,
796	        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT:  $zjq_basename_about,
797	        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS:  $zjq_basename_diags,
798	        _RBGR_GAR_HOST:            $zjq_rbga_gar_host,
799	        _RBGR_GAR_PATH:            $zjq_rbga_gar_path,
800	        _RBGR_RELIQUARIES_ROOT:    $zjq_reliquaries_root,
801	        _RBGR_RELIQUARY:           $zjq_reliquary,
802	        _RBGR_ENSHRINE_LOCATOR_1:  $zjq_locator_1,
803	        _RBGR_ENSHRINE_LOCATOR_2:  $zjq_locator_2,
804	        _RBGR_ENSHRINE_LOCATOR_3:  $zjq_locator_3
805	      },
806	      serviceAccount: $zjq_mason_sa,
807	      options: {
808	        requestedVerifyOption: "VERIFIED",
809	        automapSubstitutions: true,
810	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
811	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
812	      },
813	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
814	    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
815	    || buc_die "Failed to compose build JSON"
816	
817	  mv "${z_build_file}" "${z_output_path}" \
818	    || buc_die "Failed to write final build JSON to ${z_output_path}"
819	
820	  buc_log_args "Stitched ${#z_step_defs[@]} + context + about steps to ${z_output_path}"
821	}
822	
823	
824	
825	# Push vessel build context to GAR as a FROM SCRATCH OCI image (the pouch).
826	# The pouch carries the Dockerfile and supporting files that GCB
827	# needs in /workspace during the build.
828	#
829	# Args: token  sigil  build_context_path  hallmark
830	# Side-effect: writes context image tag to ${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}tag.txt
831	zrbfd_push_build_context() {
832	  zrbfd_sentinel
833	
834	  local -r z_token="$1"
835	  local -r z_sigil="$2"
836	  local -r z_bldctx="$3"
837	  local -r z_hallmark="$4"
838	
839	  test -d "${z_bldctx}" || buc_die "Build context directory not found: ${z_bldctx}"
840	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark required for pouch tag"
841	
842	  local -r z_gar_host="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}"
843	  local -r z_context_tag_file="${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}tag.txt"
844	  local -r z_context_dockerfile="${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}Dockerfile"
845	
846	  local -r z_context_tag="${z_gar_host}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/pouch:${z_hallmark}"
847	
848	  # Build FROM SCRATCH image containing build context
849	  buc_step "Building context image for ${z_sigil}"
850	  printf 'FROM scratch\nCOPY . /build-context/\n' > "${z_context_dockerfile}" \
851	    || buc_die "Failed to write context Dockerfile"
852	
853	  docker build --platform "${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM}" -f "${z_context_dockerfile}" -t "${z_context_tag}" "${z_bldctx}" \
854	    || buc_die "Failed to build context image"
855	
856	  # Push to GAR
857	  buc_step "Pushing context image to GAR"
858	  rbgo_docker_login "${z_token}" "${z_gar_host}"
859	
860	  docker push "${z_context_tag}" \
861	    || buc_die "Failed to push context image to GAR"
862	
863	  echo "${z_context_tag}" > "${z_context_tag_file}" \
864	    || buc_die "Failed to persist context image tag"
865	
866	  buc_info "Context image pushed: ${z_context_tag}"
867	}
868	
869	
870	######################################################################
871	# External Functions (rbfd_*)
872	
873	rbfd_enshrine() {
874	  zrbfd_sentinel
875	
876	  buc_doc_brief "Enshrine upstream base images to GAR via Cloud Build"
877	  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
878	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
879	
880	  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path) and load
881	  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
882	  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
883	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"
884	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
885	  test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-}" = "rbnve_conjure" \
886	    || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not a conjure vessel (mode: ${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-unset})"
887	
888	  # Check at least one slot declares an upstream ORIGIN. ANCHOR is a derived
889	  # value computed by this operation from ORIGIN; a vessel with no ORIGIN has
890	  # nothing for enshrine to mirror.
891	  local z_has_origin=false
892	  local z_n=""
893	  local z_origin_var=""
894	  for z_n in 1 2 3; do
895	    z_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_n}_ORIGIN"
896	    test -z "${!z_origin_var:-}" || z_has_origin=true
897	  done
898	  test "${z_has_origin}" = "true" \
899	    || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' declares no upstream base-image slots (RBRV_IMAGE_n_ORIGIN)"
900	
901	  # Resolve tool images from reliquary (enshrine uses skopeo from reliquary)
902	  zrbfc_resolve_tool_images
903	
904	  # Authenticate as Director
905	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
906	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
907	
908	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
909	  local z_token=""
910	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
911	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
912	
913	  # Verify reliquary tool images exist before submitting
914	  zrbfd_preflight_reliquary "${z_token}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
915	
916	  # Always submit the Cloud Build job. The CB step inspects current upstream
917	  # for each non-empty ORIGIN slot, computes the content-addressed locator
918	  # from the live manifest digest, and copies into GAR. Extract overwrites
919	  # whatever was previously committed in RBRV_IMAGE_n_ANCHOR with the just-
920	  # computed value — the ANCHOR is a derived artifact of the current upstream,
921	  # not a pin.
922	  zrbfd_enshrine_submit "${z_token}"
923
